title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 13–16 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #19 as the Straw Hats and Law reach Dressrosa, split into teams, and step into Doflamingo’s territory while the Mera Mera no Mi appears as bait.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My arm!! Give it back to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: of all the things!! The cotton is coming out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HAA... HAA I'VE GOT A STITCH IN MY SIDE... ALTHOUGH I'M ONLY COTTON

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hello there, I'm a soldier!! What's this now? Have we...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: MET SOMEWHERE? YOUR FACE LOOKS FAMILIAR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah! That's right, this morning's newspaper...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: One more thing that surprises visitors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They blend into the city naturally

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: No. The passionate women of this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They become frightfully jealous, and when they're betrayed by men...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Especially the beautiful ones- they're really prone to it. It's true!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: This is the land of love, passion, and toys

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Right!! So some toys are moving around, but whatever!! Let's eat!!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
